text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
One day, Curren Chan asks me to accompany her
on a photo shoot. I wait a bit at the spot where
we agreed to meet, until...

text_block_list.name: Curren Chan
text_block_list.text: I'm here!

text_block_list.name: Curren Chan
text_block_list.text: ...Phew. Sorry for making you wait!

text_block_list.name: Curren Chan
text_block_list.text:
You're so patient! Thanks! ♪ Okay, let's get
going!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I point the camera at Curren Chan, who's beaming
from ear to ear, cute as ever.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: Thinking back...

text_block_list.name: College Girl
text_block_list.text:
Listen up. I'm here to challenge you. I might not
be anywhere near as popular as you right now,
but I swear I'll get more likes than you one day!

text_block_list.name: College Girl
text_block_list.text:
Just you wait. I'll beat you using the one thing I
have that you don't—womanly charm.

text_block_list.name: Gold City
text_block_list.text:
Just like that. Focus your mind right down to your
fingertips. Then concentrate on your ears and tail.
Try not to make any unnecessary movements.

text_block_list.name: Yukino Bijin
text_block_list.text:
Gee willikers! You look splend'd, Curren! Why,
you're so lov'ly, I've fallen head ov'r heels for ya!

text_block_list.name: Curren Chan
text_block_list.text:
Now I've got womanly charm and the means to
show it off! I knew City was the right person to
ask! ♪

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I'm pretty sure she's been doing her best to show
everyone her womanly charm, but...
choice_data_list:
Have you given up on looking for your womanly
charm?

Have you given up on looking for your womanly
charm?

text_block_list.name: Curren Chan
text_block_list.text: Hmmm... Does it look that way to you?

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
While I don't think she looks like she's given up...
I find myself struggling to answer when put on the
spot...

text_block_list.name: Curren Chan
text_block_list.text:
Hehe. ...Hey. Whatever you do, don't take your
eyes off me, okay?

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Just as Curren Chan asks, I keep my eyes trained
on her and keep snapping photos. While doing
so, in a brief and unexpected lapse between
smiles, I catch a faraway look in her eyes.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: I've never seen an expression like that on her.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Those eyes, which had been focused on the lens,
have been seemingly drawn away by some other
force. I find myself about to say something to her,
when...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Curren Chan looks back in my direction and
flashes me a smirk.

text_block_list.name: Curren Chan
text_block_list.text: Hehe. What's wrong? ♪

text_block_list.name: Curren Chan
text_block_list.text:
Don't tell me—is your heart aflutter from seeing
me in a slightly different light?

text_block_list.name: Curren Chan
text_block_list.text: Really? You didn't feel anything? Nothing at all?

text_block_list.name: Curren Chan
text_block_list.text: Sniffle... Oh, my poor heart...
choice_data_list: Wait, m-my heart did skip a beat!

text_block_list.name: Curren Chan
text_block_list.text: ...Hehe, I know. ♪

text_block_list.name: Curren Chan
text_block_list.text:
You know, I thought of something. If I changed
everything about myself... I wouldn't be me
anymore.

text_block_list.name: Curren Chan
text_block_list.text:
My womanly charm and my cuteness come as a
pair. I'm sure of it.

text_block_list.name: Curren Chan
text_block_list.text:
If people can see my womanly charm within my
usual cuteness, that's good enough for me!

text_block_list.name: Curren Chan
text_block_list.text: Do you get what I mean? ...Trainer? ♪

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
It sounds as if she's testing me, but her smile is
innocent. I can only manage a nod in reply.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
A few days later, I find out that the photos we
took already have quite a number of likes.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Not only that, but the college girl apparently sent
her a DM saying, "I noticed that new charm of
yours! But I'm still gonna beat you!"

text_block_list.name: Curren Chan
text_block_list.text:
I wish you'd be a little clearer... Or do you mean
that I still have a ways to go?

text_block_list.name: Gold City
text_block_list.text: Looking good. I'd say you're just about there.

text_block_list.name: Curren Chan
text_block_list.text:
Oh, hey, City! Were you... watching me, by any
chance?

text_block_list.name: Gold City
text_block_list.text:
I just happened to have a shoot nearby. In any
case, it looks like you've found your womanly
charm.

text_block_list.name: Curren Chan
text_block_list.text: Ehehe, so you picked up on it?

text_block_list.name: Gold City
text_block_list.text:
Basically, Curren Chan is never going to be about
womanly charm alone.

text_block_list.name: Gold City
text_block_list.text: Cuteness is a part of who she is, after all.

text_block_list.name: Curren Chan
text_block_list.text: Yep! ♪ Without that, I wouldn't be me.

text_block_list.name: Gold City
text_block_list.text: But she's not only cute. Sometimes, a brief glimpse of an expression or a gesture... something she doesn't usually show, shines through.

text_block_list.name: Gold City
text_block_list.text: As far as Curren Chan is concerned, that is her womanly charm. ...Isn't that right?

text_block_list.name: Curren Chan
text_block_list.text: Right on the money! ☆

text_block_list.name: Curren Chan
text_block_list.text:
I'm still getting the hang of it right now, but I'm
going to polish my womanly charm little by little
every day from now on. You know why?

text_block_list.name: Curren Chan
text_block_list.text:
'Cause I want everyone to be even more head
over heels for me! ♪

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Curren Chan says this with her trademark
adorable smile.
